violations.description: FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): Floors and walls in the areas subject to moisture and under and around in place equipment noted in need of cleaning.
NON FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (1 pts): Reachin cooler interiors reachin cooler door gaskets counter by coffee makers and other equipment exteriors noted need cleaning
IN-USE UTENSILS (1 pts): In - use utensil noted being stored with the handle laying in the flour. Only use scoops with handles.

SANITIZATION OF EQUIP. AND UTENSILS (4 pts): The temperature of the rinse cycle of the heat sanitizing dish machine noted not adequate to achieve final sanitization. Max temperature reached was 146.9?F.
NON FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - DESIGN (1 pts): Door gasket on walkin cooler door noted not in good repair.
